note: For each interior-color count c and seed, a generated framed 8x8 board (5-color border band, c interior colors, total c+5) is solved by the engine's plain row-major backtracking DFS under a fixed node budget. 'nodes' is DFS steps (placements + backtracks) to the first full solution, or the budget/exhaustion point when unsolved. Effort is measured in nodes so it is hardware-independent and deterministic; 'seconds' is informational only. The peak in median nodes / solve-rate vs c is the hardness peak.
